name: RackPeek
description: A webui and CLI tool to discover, manage, and document your home lab and small-scale IT infrastructure. Track hardware, services, networks, and their relationships using open, non-proprietary YAML.
longDescription: A webui and CLI tool to discover, manage, and document your home lab and small-scale IT infrastructure. Track hardware, services, networks, and their relationships using open, non-proprietary YAML.
